---
title: "Hirotaka Fukui"
author:
  firstname: Hirotaka
  lastname: Fukui
  address: "Graduate School of Economics, Kobe University, 2-1 Rokkodai-cho Nada-ku, Kobe, Hyogo Prefecture, 657-8501, Japan"
  position: "Ph.D. Student in Economics, Kobe University. International Macroeconomics, Monetary Economics, and Macro-Finance."
  contacts:
    - icon: fa envelope
      text: 227e127e@gsuite.kobe-u.ac.jp
      url: "mailto:227e127e@gsuite.kobe-u.ac.jp"
    - icon: assets/icon/bi-house-fill.svg
      text: fukui-hirotaka.com
      url: https://fukui-hirotaka.com/
    - icon: fa brands orcid
      text: 0009-0004-9796-9148
      url: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-9796-9148
    - icon: fa brands github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/Hirotaka-Fukui-Pitti-King
    - icon: fa brands linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hirotaka-fukui-90495b342
    - icon: fa brands x-twitter
      text: X
      url: https://x.com/PittiKing
format: awesomecv-typst
brand:
  typography: 
    fonts:
      - family: Roboto
        source: google
        weight: [100, 400, 700]
      - family: Source Sans 3
        source: google
        weight: [100, 400, 700]
        style: [normal, italic]
    base: Source Sans 3
  color:
    primary: "#4d4398"
    link: "#674196"
  defaults: 
    awesomecv-typst:
      font-header: Roboto
---

## Current Position

{{< yaml assets/yml/position.yml >}}

## Education

{{< yaml assets/yml/education.yml >}}

## Publications

{{< yaml assets/yml/publication.yml >}}

## FELLOWSHIPS AND RESEARCH GRANTS

{{< yaml assets/yml/fellowship.yml >}}

## Skills

{{< yaml assets/yml/skill.yml >}}
